title: dependency column on sequence violated by DROP SEQUENCE
poc: create table t (i int auto_increment, val int);
CREATE TABLE test (t int DEFAULT  NEXT VALUE FOR \"my_test_seq\", v char);
key_bug_features: DROP SEQUENCE affects dependency column in table
bug_features_seed: CREATE SEQUENCE my_test_seq START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1;
CREATE TABLE test (t int DEFAULT NEXT VALUE FOR "my_test_seq", v char(10));
